title: PlatformManifest
description: Manifest-driven description of one Zon platform release for online installation: the platform version pins the supported K3s/chart/image versions; each service carries its own independent version. The installer (zonctl) reads this rather than hardcoding these values.

platformVersion.description: The complete tested platform release version, distinct from any individual service's version.

chartRepository.description: Must be an OCI registry reference; `helm pull` resolves chartName/chartVersion from it. Classic (non-OCI) Helm chart repos are not supported in v1 online mode.

supportedUpgradeSources.description: Platform versions this release is permitted to upgrade from (the N-1 policy).

services.description: Per-service versions (e.g. zon-core, zon-api, zon-ui, zon-registry, zon-observability, zon-agent), independent of platformVersion. Services may evolve independently while remaining compatible with this platform release.

enabledComponents.description: Which optional platform components this release enables by default (e.g. "zon-observability", "zon-registry").
